summary: Faster Gmail when running multiple accounts at once.

introduced: Only the selected inbox web view stays mounted — other accounts pause in the background
changed: Shared WebKit process pool across Gmail, Chat, and Calendar web views
Unread polling pauses when Inbox is hidden to reduce CPU and memory use
Lighter unread badge scraping with less JavaScript work per poll
fixed: Switching between Gmail account tabs no longer feels sluggish with four or more accounts
